title: matelea nipensis
intro: Matelea nipensis, also known as the "Yellow Trumpet Vine," is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, Matelea nipensis has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in the relief of respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Matelea nipensis can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of these uses.
